# Smart Money Manager

> Bilingual (English/Bengali) money management SaaS for digital, creative and software agencies. Track cash flow, invoices, budgets and goals.

Smart Money Manager (by Easy Life) centralizes agency finances — balances, transactions, budgets with alerts, savings goals, and analytics — in one workspace with an instant English ↔ Bengali toggle.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and features for agencies.
